function.message: Completed the oldest inbox item by running the six specified finance documents through the OCR/frontmatter migration workflow. Added YAML frontmatter to each listed file using the finance schema and preserved each original note body below the frontmatter. Then deleted the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree/read/context), read system workflows and schema before task work, read nested AGENTS files for inbox and finance lanes, preserved original body text when adding YAML frontmatter, and deleted the inbox item after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md explicitly listed six finance records to OCR. Each target file was read, then updated in place with required invoice/bill frontmatter fields per 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md, while keeping the original body content intact as required by migration workflow docs. After completing all six, the processed inbox file was deleted per 99_system/workflows/process-next-inbox-item.md and 00_inbox/AGENTS.MD.
completed_steps_laconic: read OCR + migration workflows and finance schema
